description_long: This is a tall, freestanding cabinet with a classic, elegant design, featuring a two-part structure. The upper section has two large glass-paneled doors, allowing visibility into the interior shelves, which are ideal for displaying items. The lower section consists of two solid doors with raised panels and two small drawers above them, providing concealed storage space. The cabinet is finished in a light, neutral color and stands on four small, rounded feet. Decorative molding accents the top and base, giving it a refined, traditional appearance. The handles and knobs are subtly integrated, maintaining the cabinet's clean lines.
description: A tall, classic freestanding cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors and solid lower doors, finished in a light color with decorative molding.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled upper doors, two solid lower doors, and two small drawers.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the cabinet's depth, stepped profile, and decorative molding.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, highlighting the cabinet's depth and stepped design.
